title: Agentic AI Is an Infrastructure Game [Promoted Content]
summary_full: CADA is Europe’s opportunity to unlock sovereign, agentic-ready compute at scale and create the conditions for sustained investment. Now it must be implemented at pace and with ambition.
summary_public: CADA is Europe’s opportunity to unlock sovereign, agentic-ready compute at scale and create the conditions for sustained investment. Now it must be implemented at pace and with ambition.
